categories.name: Python / Django
categories.context: CONTEXT [Python/Django]: This project uses Django 5.x with DRF for the API layer. Models live in app/models/, serializers in app/api/serializers/. Run migrations with `python manage.py migrate`. Tests use pytest-django — run with `pytest --reuse-db`.

categories.name: React / TypeScript
categories.context: CONTEXT [React/TS]: Frontend is React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS. Components in src/components/, pages in src/app/. State management via Zustand. Build with `npm run build`. Lint with `npm run lint`.

categories.name: Database / SQL
categories.context: CONTEXT [Database]: Primary database is PostgreSQL 16. Always DESCRIBE a table before writing INSERT/UPDATE statements — verify column names and count. Migrations are version-controlled in db/migrations/. Never run destructive DDL without confirming with the user first.

categories.name: DevOps / CI
categories.context: CONTEXT [DevOps]: CI runs via GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/). Docker images built with multi-stage Dockerfile. Production deploys go through staging first. Environment variables are in .env.example (never commit real .env files). Infrastructure is defined in infra/ using Terraform.

categories.name: Testing
categories.context: CONTEXT [Testing]: Backend tests use pytest (tests/). Frontend tests use Jest + React Testing Library (src/__tests__/). E2E tests use Playwright (e2e/). Run all with `make test`. Aim for >80% coverage on new code. Always run the relevant test suite after making changes.
